title: SonicWall WAN Failover and Load-Balance Path Events (SonicWall)
dataSources: `sourcetype=dell:sonicwall` system events for interface failover, probe failure, LB group changes
spl:
index=netops sourcetype="dell:sonicwall" earliest=-24h
| where match(_raw,"(?i)failover|LB group|probe.*fail|link.*down|WAN")
| stats count by host, message
| sort -count
description: WAN transitions directly affect SaaS and voice quality. Structured monitoring reduces MTTR when a circuit or probe fails.
value: Operations teams validate SLA credits and prove redundant path testing.
implementation: Enable SNMP traps or syslog for HA/LLB events. Correlate with carrier tickets.

references.title: Splunkbase — Dell SonicWall Add-on for Splunk
Splunk Connect for Syslog — Dell SonicWall reference

grandmaExplanation: WAN transitions directly affect SaaS and voice quality — we monitor SonicWall logs so teams can act before users feel pain.
